Model before rewriting:

letting n be 5
letting N be domain int(1..n)
find board: matrix indexed by [N, N] of int(0..2)
find amountOfQueens: int(1..((product([n,n;int(1..)]) / 2)))

such that

(sum([ sum([ toInt((board[row, col] = 1)) | col : N ]) | row : N ]) = amountOfQueens),
(sum([ sum([ toInt((board[row, col] = 2)) | col : N ]) | row : N ]) = amountOfQueens),
and([ ((col1 < col2)) -> ((sum([board[row, col1],board[row, col2];int(1..)]) != 3)) | row : N, col1 : N, col2 : N ]),
and([ ((row1 < row2)) -> ((sum([board[row1, col],board[row2, col];int(1..)]) != 3)) | col : N, row1 : N, row2 : N ]),
and([ and([and([and([(and([(sum([row1,i;int(1..)]) <= n),(sum([col1,i;int(1..)]) <= n);int(1..)])) -> ((and([(sum([row1,i;int(1..)]) = row2),(sum([col1,i;int(1..)]) = col2);int(1..)])) -> ((sum([board[row1, col1],board[row2, col2];int(1..)]) != 3))),(and([(sum([row1,i;int(1..)]) <= n),((col1 - i) > 0);int(1..)])) -> ((and([(sum([row1,i;int(1..)]) = row2),((col1 - i) = col2);int(1..)])) -> ((sum([board[row1, col1],board[row2, col2];int(1..)]) != 3)));int(1..)]),(and([((row1 - i) > 0),((col1 - i) > 0);int(1..)])) -> ((and([((row1 - i) = row2),((col1 - i) = col2);int(1..)])) -> ((sum([board[row1, col1],board[row2, col2];int(1..)]) != 3)));int(1..)]),(and([((row1 - i) > 0),(sum([col1,i;int(1..)]) <= n);int(1..)])) -> ((and([((row1 - i) = row2),(sum([col1,i;int(1..)]) = col2);int(1..)])) -> ((sum([board[row1, col1],board[row2, col2];int(1..)]) != 3)));int(1..)]) | i : N, col1 : N, col2 : N, row1 : N, row2 : N ])
